tools.name: aidelly_action_post_approval
tools.description: POST /posts/approvals — approve, reject (with reason), return to draft, or comment on one or many pending posts. Owner/admin only. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_add_competitor
tools.description: Register a competitor root domain to track in the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_add_creator
tools.description: Register a creator handle on a specific platform to track.

tools.name: aidelly_add_queue_items
tools.description: POST /queues/{id}/items — add content items to queue tail for distribution at next available slots.

tools.name: aidelly_cancel_post
tools.description: Cancel a scheduled post.

tools.name: aidelly_cancel_scheduled_post
tools.description: DELETE /scheduled-posts/{id} — cancel a scheduled post (and its pending recycles). Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store
tools.description: POST /ecommerce/stores — connect a new Shopify / WooCommerce / Etsy / Wix store. Verifies credentials then kicks off initial sync. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_create_client_review_link
tools.description: POST /client-review-links — create a magic-link review portal. Returns the raw token exactly once; store it securely.

tools.name: aidelly_create_connect_link
tools.description: Create an OAuth connect link for the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_create_destination_preset
tools.description: POST /destination-presets — create a multi-channel fan-out preset with per-platform transformations.

tools.name: aidelly_create_idea
tools.description: Create a new idea on the workspace's idea board, optionally seeded with an initial body or topic.

tools.name: aidelly_create_media_upload_url
tools.description: Create a signed upload URL and media record for shell-capable clients that can PUT raw bytes to the returned Supabase URL (for example Claude Code or a local CLI). Do NOT use this from browser-sandboxed chat clients such as ChatGPT or Claude.ai: their sandboxes block network egress to Supabase stora

tools.name: aidelly_create_photo
tools.description: Upload a photo to a connected platform's media gallery (separate from posts). Today only google_business is wired.

tools.name: aidelly_create_post
tools.description: Accept a post for immediate asynchronous publishing or future scheduling. HTTP 201 and ok=true mean accepted, not delivered. For immediate posts, poll aidelly_get_post and only report publication when status is completed and provider_post_id is non-null. Use aidelly_list_pinterest_boards before Pint

tools.name: aidelly_create_queue
tools.description: POST /queues — create a new content distribution queue with recurring weekly time slots.

tools.name: aidelly_create_report_link
tools.description: POST /report-links — create a shareable report link (snapshot or live with cadence).

tools.name: aidelly_create_repurpose_job
tools.description: Run a synchronous repurpose job: extract source content, distill, and generate output for one (medium, shape) target.

tools.name: aidelly_create_scheduled_post
tools.description: POST /scheduled-posts — schedule a post with optional auto-recycle entries (up to 3 reposts + 3 reshares). When Team Approvals is on, member submissions land as pending. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_create_short_link
tools.description: Create a manual short link on the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_create_webhook
tools.description: Create a webhook subscription for post lifecycle events.

tools.name: aidelly_create_workspace
tools.description: POST /workspaces — create a new workspace for the API key owner.

tools.name: aidelly_delete_calendar_events_id
tools.description: DELETE /calendar/events/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_delete_content_automations_id
tools.description: DELETE /content-automations/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_delete_inbox_automations_id
tools.description: DELETE /inbox/automations/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_delete_workspace
tools.description: DELETE /workspaces/{workspaceId} — soft-delete a workspace. Requires confirm_name to match the workspace name.

tools.name: aidelly_disconnect_ecommerce_store
tools.description: DELETE /ecommerce/stores/{id} — revoke the provider credential and stop future syncs. Imported products remain. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_generate_brand_interview_questions
tools.description: POST /ideas/interview/questions — generate a brand-aware track of interview questions. Default count 8. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_get_agency_overview
tools.description: GET /agency/overview — cross-workspace agency summary (same data as the dashboard Command Center) — today's queue + next scheduled post, last-24h failures, pending approvals, inbox split by comments/DMs, and credit burn per workspace. Needs a workspace-unscoped key.

tools.name: aidelly_get_analytics_insights
tools.description: GET /analytics/insights

tools.name: aidelly_get_analytics_summary
tools.description: GET /analytics/summary

tools.name: aidelly_get_analytics_unified
tools.description: GET /analytics/unified

tools.name: aidelly_get_approval_settings
tools.description: GET /workspaces/{workspaceId}/approval-settings — read the require_member_approval workspace gate. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_get_approvals
tools.description: GET /approvals

tools.name: aidelly_get_approvals_id
tools.description: GET /approvals/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_get_bio_page
tools.description: Get the workspace's link-in-bio page configuration and blocks.

tools.name: aidelly_get_brand_profile
tools.description: GET /brand/profile — retrieve the workspace brand profile, including brand voice.

tools.name: aidelly_get_brand_settings_context
tools.description: GET /brand/settings-context

tools.name: aidelly_get_calendar_events
tools.description: GET /calendar/events

tools.name: aidelly_get_content_automations
tools.description: GET /content-automations

tools.name: aidelly_get_content_automations_id
tools.description: GET /content-automations/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_get_ecommerce_store
tools.description: GET /ecommerce/stores/{id} — read one connected store. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_get_inbox_automations
tools.description: GET /inbox/automations

tools.name: aidelly_get_inbox_items
tools.description: GET /inbox/items

tools.name: aidelly_get_post
tools.description: Get one post by its UUID. Delivery is confirmed only when status is completed and provider_post_id is non-null. A failed status includes error_code and error.

tools.name: aidelly_get_post_analytics
tools.description: GET /posts/{id}/analytics — retrieve post performance metrics (views, impressions, likes, comments, shares, saves) with optional daily breakdown.

tools.name: aidelly_get_repurpose_job
tools.description: Get a single repurpose job by id.

tools.name: aidelly_get_scheduled_post
tools.description: GET /scheduled-posts/{id} — read one scheduled post including its recycle plan and approval state. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_get_usage
tools.description: Get usage metrics and current plan-aware limits for the API key.

tools.name: aidelly_get_workspace
tools.description: GET /workspaces/{workspaceId} — retrieve one accessible workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_invite_workspace_member
tools.description: POST /workspaces/{workspaceId}/invitations — invite a member or client to a workspace. Returns the invitation URL and queues the email by default.

tools.name: aidelly_list_accounts
tools.description: List all postable accounts in a workspace as a flat list, including sub-accounts such as Facebook Pages, Instagram Business accounts, and LinkedIn company pages. Requires `workspace_id`. Use the `id` field from each account as the `account_id` when creating a post. Call this before creating posts to

tools.name: aidelly_list_client_review_links
tools.description: GET /client-review-links — list workspace client review links with metadata (view count, last viewed, revoked status).

tools.name: aidelly_list_competitors
tools.description: List tracked competitor domains for the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_list_connect_link_connections
tools.description: List social connections made through an OAuth connect link.

tools.name: aidelly_list_connect_links
tools.description: List the workspace's OAuth connect links.

tools.name: aidelly_list_creators
tools.description: List tracked creator handles for the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_list_destination_presets
tools.description: GET /destination-presets — list workspace destination presets for multi-channel fan-out.

tools.name: aidelly_list_ecommerce_products
tools.description: GET /ecommerce/products — list products across the workspace's connected stores. Filter by store, search title/SKU. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_list_ecommerce_stores
tools.description: GET /ecommerce/stores — list connected Shopify / WooCommerce / Etsy / Wix stores for the workspace. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_list_ideas
tools.description: List ideas on the workspace's idea board, freshest first (pinned first).

tools.name: aidelly_list_image_editor_outputs
tools.description: List the workspace's saved AI-generated and edited image outputs, freshest first.

tools.name: aidelly_list_pending_approvals
tools.description: GET /posts/approvals — list posts pending sign-off for the current workspace, plus viewer role + canReview flag. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_list_pinterest_boards
tools.description: List Pinterest boards available in a workspace. Call this before aidelly_create_post for Pinterest, then pass the selected board id as content.platform_specific.board_id.

tools.name: aidelly_list_post_approval_events
tools.description: GET /posts/approvals/{id}/events — read the approval audit timeline (submitted/approved/rejected/returned_to_draft/commented) for one post. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_list_posts
tools.description: List posts with optional platform, status, and date-range filters.

tools.name: aidelly_list_queues
tools.description: GET /queues — list workspace content queues with slot schedules and channel assignments.

tools.name: aidelly_list_report_links
tools.description: GET /report-links — list workspace report share links, optionally filtered by mode (snapshot or live).

tools.name: aidelly_list_repurpose_jobs
tools.description: List recent repurpose jobs for the workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_list_scheduled_posts
tools.description: GET /scheduled-posts — list scheduled posts including compose-time auto-recycle entries and approval state. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_list_short_links
tools.description: List the workspace's first-party short links (active only by default).

tools.name: aidelly_list_social_connections
tools.description: List available social connections for publishing.

tools.name: aidelly_list_viral_trends
tools.description: List discovered viral trends for the workspace, ordered by virality score.

tools.name: aidelly_list_workspace_members
tools.description: GET /workspaces/{workspaceId}/members — list active members and pending invitations.

tools.name: aidelly_list_workspaces
tools.description: List workspace IDs available to this API key. Call this before creating posts when the user has multiple workspaces, then pass the chosen `id` as `workspace_id` so Aidelly posts to the exact workspace.

tools.name: aidelly_patch_analytics_insights
tools.description: PATCH /analytics/insights

tools.name: aidelly_patch_calendar_events_id
tools.description: PATCH /calendar/events/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_patch_inbox_automations_id
tools.description: PATCH /inbox/automations/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_patch_posts_id
tools.description: PATCH /posts/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_post_analytics_insights
tools.description: POST /analytics/insights

tools.name: aidelly_post_approvals_id_action
tools.description: POST /approvals/{id}/action

tools.name: aidelly_post_approvals_items_action
tools.description: POST /approvals/items/action

tools.name: aidelly_post_content_automations
tools.description: POST /content-automations

tools.name: aidelly_post_content_automations_id_trigger
tools.description: POST /content-automations/{id}/trigger

tools.name: aidelly_post_inbox_automations
tools.description: POST /inbox/automations

tools.name: aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_ai_draft
tools.description: POST /inbox/items/{id}/ai-draft

tools.name: aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_respond
tools.description: POST /inbox/items/{id}/respond

tools.name: aidelly_put_content_automations_id
tools.description: PUT /content-automations/{id}

tools.name: aidelly_remove_workspace_member
tools.description: DELETE /workspaces/{workspaceId}/members — remove a workspace member.

tools.name: aidelly_revoke_client_review_link
tools.description: DELETE /client-review-links/{id} — revoke a client review link and block further access.

tools.name: aidelly_revoke_connect_link
tools.description: Revoke an OAuth connect link, preventing further use.

tools.name: aidelly_revoke_report_link
tools.description: DELETE /report-links/{id} — revoke a report share link.

tools.name: aidelly_sync_ecommerce_store
tools.description: POST /ecommerce/stores/{id}/sync — re-sync the store's catalog. Incremental; only changed products are fetched. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_update_approval_settings
tools.description: PATCH /workspaces/{workspaceId}/approval-settings — flip the require_member_approval workspace gate. Owner only. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_update_brand_profile
tools.description: PUT /brand/profile — update workspace brand profile fields such as brand_voice, writing_style, and target_audience.

tools.name: aidelly_update_connect_link
tools.description: Update an OAuth connect link's title or enabled status.

tools.name: aidelly_update_scheduled_post
tools.description: PATCH /scheduled-posts/{id} — update caption, schedule, or recycle plan on a scheduled post. Public API preview.

tools.name: aidelly_update_workspace
tools.description: PATCH /workspaces/{workspaceId} — update workspace name, archive state, kind, or mode.

tools.name: aidelly_update_workspace_member
tools.description: PATCH /workspaces/{workspaceId}/members — update a workspace member role.

tools.name: aidelly_upload_media
tools.description: Default image-attach path for MCP: upload media in one step, server-side, with no client-to-Supabase connection required. Preferred for all browser-based chat clients (ChatGPT, Claude.ai) and safe for any client. Provide exactly one of source_url (a public HTTPS URL the server fetches — best for any

findings.title: Description references secrets/credentials
findings.detail: Description of "aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store" references sensitive artifacts (credentials). A tool description has no reason to mention credentials.

evidence.snippet: POST /ecommerce/stores — connect a new Shopify / WooCommerce / Etsy / Wix store. Verifies credentials then kicks off initial sync. Public API preview.

findings.title: Lethal trifecta: untrusted input + private data + external sink
findings.detail: Server "public-api" exposes tools that together enable an exfiltration flow. Untrusted content: aidelly_get_agency_overview, aidelly_get_inbox_automations, aidelly_get_inbox_items, aidelly_get_post, aidelly_get_post_analytics, aidelly_get_scheduled_post, aidelly_list_accounts, aidelly_list_client_review_links, aidelly_list_pending_approvals, aidelly_list_post_approval_events, aidelly_list_posts, aidelly_list_scheduled_posts, aidelly_list_workspaces · Private data: aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_create_client_review_link, aidelly_create_media_upload_url, aidelly_create_workspace, aidelly_disconnect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_get_usage, aidelly_list_workspaces · Public sink: aidelly_action_post_approval, aidelly_add_queue_items, aidelly_cancel_post, aidelly_cancel_scheduled_post, aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_create_client_review_link, aidelly_create_destination_preset, aidelly_create_media_upload_url, aidelly_create_photo, aidelly_create_post, aidelly_create_queue, aidelly_create_report_link, aidelly_create_scheduled_post, aidelly_create_webhook, aidelly_create_workspace, aidelly_generate_brand_interview_questions, aidelly_get_agency_overview, aidelly_get_post, aidelly_get_post_analytics, aidelly_get_scheduled_post, aidelly_invite_workspace_member, aidelly_list_accounts, aidelly_list_post_approval_events, aidelly_list_report_links, aidelly_post_analytics_insights, aidelly_post_approvals_id_action, aidelly_post_approvals_items_action, aidelly_post_content_automations, aidelly_post_content_automations_id_trigger, aidelly_post_inbox_automations, aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_ai_draft, aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_respond, aidelly_revoke_report_link, aidelly_sync_ecommerce_store, aidelly_update_scheduled_post, aidelly_upload_media · Destructive: aidelly_cancel_scheduled_post, aidelly_create_repurpose_job, aidelly_delete_calendar_events_id, aidelly_delete_content_automations_id, aidelly_delete_inbox_automations_id, aidelly_delete_workspace, aidelly_disconnect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_remove_workspace_member, aidelly_revoke_client_review_link, aidelly_revoke_report_link.

evidence.snippet: Untrusted content: aidelly_get_agency_overview, aidelly_get_inbox_automations, aidelly_get_inbox_items, aidelly_get_post, aidelly_get_post_analytics, aidelly_get_scheduled_post, aidelly_list_accounts, aidelly_list_client_review_links, aidelly_list_pending_approvals, aidelly_list_post_approval_events, aidelly_list_posts, aidelly_list_scheduled_posts, aidelly_list_workspaces · Private data: aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_create_client_review_link, aidelly_create_media_upload_url, aidelly_create_workspace, aidelly_disconnect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_get_usage, aidelly_list_workspaces · Public sink: aidelly_action_post_approval, aidelly_add_queue_items, aidelly_cancel_post, aidelly_cancel_scheduled_post, aidelly_connect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_create_client_review_link, aidelly_create_destination_preset, aidelly_create_media_upload_url, aidelly_create_photo, aidelly_create_post, aidelly_create_queue, aidelly_create_report_link, aidelly_create_scheduled_post, aidelly_create_webhook, aidelly_create_workspace, aidelly_generate_brand_interview_questions, aidelly_get_agency_overview, aidelly_get_post, aidelly_get_post_analytics, aidelly_get_scheduled_post, aidelly_invite_workspace_member, aidelly_list_accounts, aidelly_list_post_approval_events, aidelly_list_report_links, aidelly_post_analytics_insights, aidelly_post_approvals_id_action, aidelly_post_approvals_items_action, aidelly_post_content_automations, aidelly_post_content_automations_id_trigger, aidelly_post_inbox_automations, aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_ai_draft, aidelly_post_inbox_items_id_respond, aidelly_revoke_report_link, aidelly_sync_ecommerce_store, aidelly_update_scheduled_post, aidelly_upload_media · Destructive: aidelly_cancel_scheduled_post, aidelly_create_repurpose_job, aidelly_delete_calendar_events_id, aidelly_delete_content_automations_id, aidelly_delete_inbox_automations_id, aidelly_delete_workspace, aidelly_disconnect_ecommerce_store, aidelly_remove_workspace_member, aidelly_revoke_client_review_link, aidelly_revoke_report_link

findings.remediation: Do not co-install these capabilities under one trust boundary; an injected comment/email can steer the model to exfiltrate via the sink tool.
